---
title: "Side quests"
description: >-
  Hobby projects and interests outside research: gw2timer, this website,
  digital art, tabletop games and music.
pagetitle: "Side quests"
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
Projects that are not the main work.
:::

## Shipped

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
### gw2timer <span class="status-badge status-maintained">maintained</span>
A lightweight timer for tracking dynamic world events in *Guild Wars 2*.

::: {.tag-row}
[JavaScript]{.pill} [Web]{.pill} [Personal]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/nemitheasura/gw2timer){.btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
### This website <span class="status-badge status-active">active</span>
Built with Quarto, deployed from GitHub Actions. The source is public.

::: {.tag-row}
[Quarto]{.pill} [SCSS]{.pill} [GitHub Actions]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/nemitheasura/nemitheasura.github.io){.btn-ghost}
:::
:::

## Interests

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-brush"></i></span>

#### Digital art
Character and creature work, mostly fantasy. Gallery on the
[Illustrations](illustrations/index.qmd) page.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-dice-5"></i></span>

#### Games and fantasy
Tabletop RPGs, computer RPGs, and secondary-world fiction.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i></span>

#### Music
Rock, metal and classical.
:::
:::
